message:
feat(dolt): add BD_SKIP_ACCESS_LOCK env var for lock testing

Adds an environment variable to bypass the flock-based dolt-access.lock
layer, allowing testing of whether Dolt's internal locking mechanism is
sufficient for concurrent access.

Set BD_SKIP_ACCESS_LOCK=1 to skip the advisory lock acquisition in
embedded mode. This enables testing with ~50 concurrent workers to
determine if the flock layer can be removed.

Fixes bd-39gso

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
